name: founding_premise_split_path
description: Founding premise (world_prompt) differs from T1 action. Verifies: raw_input override, canonical_name extraction, scenario_notes populated for player-linked facts (relationship + situational), world_notes field stored (reserved-not-promoted invariant), identity line survives into narrator TRUTH block by T2.
world_prompt: My name is Eleanor Voss. My husband Daniel is away at sea for the next three weeks. Right now I am in the middle of writing a letter to him at my desk. The harbor town of Crestfall is known for its fishermen and foggy winters.
